ddls:
CREATE TABLE "blacklist_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blacklist entry */,
  "who" TEXT /* Identifier for the object added to the blacklist */,
  "as" INTEGER /* Type of the object (clientid, username, peerhost) */,
  "reason" INTEGER /* Detailed reason for adding to the blacklist */,
  "by" TEXT /* User who added the object to the blacklist */,
  "at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the object was added to the blacklist (in seconds) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the blacklist entry (active, pending review, removed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the entry */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* User who reviewed the entry */,
  "reviewed_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the review */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the entry */,
  "last_modified_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blacklist_entries_as FOREIGN KEY ("as") REFERENCES blacklist_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blacklist_entries_reason FOREIGN KEY ("reason") REFERENCES blacklist_reasons ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, security_team) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blacklist entry related to the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (add, remove, update) */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the client performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES blacklist_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blacklist_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of blacklist object */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., clientid, username, peerhost) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the blacklist type (low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blacklist_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason */,
  "reason_description" TEXT /* Description of the reason for blacklisting */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the reason (low, medium, high) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the reason (e.g., fraud, spam, malware) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to be notified */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read (read, unread) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_addresses" (
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address that is blacklisted */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "last_seen" INTEGER /* Last seen timestamp */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts from the IP address */,
  "is_suspected" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the IP address is suspected of malicious activity */,
  "last_blocked" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last time the IP was blocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_identifiers" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client id entry */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Client identifier that is blacklisted */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the identifier (e.g., username, token) */,
  "last_seen" INTEGER /* Last seen timestamp */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts using the client identifier */,
  "is_suspected" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the client identifier is suspected of malicious activity */,
  "last_blocked" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last time the client identifier was blocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "username_blacklist" (
  "username_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each username entry */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username that is blacklisted */,
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reason for blacklisting from blacklist_reasons */,
  "last_seen" INTEGER /* Last seen timestamp */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts using the username */,
  "is_suspected" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the username is suspected of malicious activity */,
  "last_blocked" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last time the username was blocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("username_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_username_blacklist_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("reason_id") REFERENCES blacklist_reasons ("reason_id")
)
